basic_details.job_title: NKGSB Branch Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NKGSB Co-operative Bank Ltd. has officially announced the Branch Manager Recruitment 2026 with vacancies not mentioned openings. The detailed notification was published at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 40 years (relaxable up to 5 years) and hold a minimum second class graduate qualification can now submit their applications through email before the last date 30 June 2026. Direct details regarding the notification and application process are shared in the official recruitment notice.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: Up to 5 years for special deserving cases.

qualification.details: Branch Manager: Minimum second class graduate with a minimum of 7 years of Branch banking experience in Assistant Manager Cadre or above, with branch leadership exposure. Specialized qualifications like CA, CS, MBA, with banking experience of a minimum of 5 years, will be given preference for direct interview. Thorough knowledge of branch operations, business development, audit compliance, and team management. Local candidates preferred.

selection_process: Candidates are required to mail their updated resume
clearly mentioning the ‘Position applied for ‘Branch Manager - Goa’ to [email protected]
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NKGSB Branch Manager Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NKGSB Branch Manager Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download NKGSB Branch Manager Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NKGSB Branch Manager position?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Branch Manager position at NKGSB Co-operative Bank Ltd. is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Branch Manager role?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is a second-class graduate degree. However, specialized qualifications like CA, CS, or MBA with relevant banking experience are preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to the Branch Manager post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Branch Manager position is 40 years. There is a provision for age relaxation of up to 5 years for special deserving cases.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Branch Manager position at NKGSB?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your updated resume to the specified email address, clearly mentioning the position applied for.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required experience for the Branch Manager role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 7 years of Branch banking experience in the Assistant Manager Cadre or above is required. For those with specialized qualifications, a minimum of 5 years of banking experience is preferred.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification released by NKGSB Co-operative Bank Ltd. for the Branch Manager position.

faq.question: Q7. Which state is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment for the Branch Manager position is specifically for Goa.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Branch Manager post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Branch Manager position announced in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What kind of knowledge is expected from the candidates?
faq.answer: Candidates are expected to have thorough knowledge of branch operations, business development, audit compliance, and team management.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a link to the PDF document is provided.
